Venue Info

Ruoff Music Center
Noblesville, IN

Klipsch Music Center (Changed after 2017)

06.12.05 - Seek Up (21:50)

  6.3.06 – Dreaming Tree, The (after 1031 days)

Venue Picture
Description
Deer Creek Music Center opened in 1989 among corn and soybean fields on the outskirts of Indianapolis. In 2001 the venue name was changed to Verizon Wireless Music Center, and the lawn was expanded to hold an extra 4,000 spectators. In April of 2003 the venue was annexed into the city limits of Noblesville, IN.

12880 E. 146th St.
Noblesville, IN 46060

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Idea of You (6.2.06)
Eh Hee (full band) (8.18.07)
